g.text: Active commitments by provider and project; bar length = years operational or contracted
Source: AWS / Microsoft / Google / Oracle press releases 2017-2025; NVIDIA Newsroom Oct 2024; operator filings (NTT, Yotta, CtrlS, AdaniConneX, Reliance).
